wrote:

> Dear Jeffrey, Gerry, and Nat,
> 
> Here is a draft of my declaration of war letter that
> I hope we will never 
> have to use.  But I wanted to have it ready just in
> case.  Can anybody 
> think of anything more to add?  We can always take
> things out before we 
> send it, if we have to, but I want to make sure that
> we haven't left out 
> anything that might be important.
> 
> Alan

body_html:
i like it

--- "Alan M. Dershowitz" dersh@law.harvard.edu
wrote:

Dear Jeffrey, Gerry, and Nat,

Here is a draft of my declaration of war letter that
I hope we will never
have to use. But I wanted to have it ready just in
case. Can anybody
think of anything more to add? We can always take
things out before we
send it, if we have to, but I want to make sure that
we haven't left out
anything that might be important.

Alan
